recommendations.title: Gun Shy
recommendations.overview: A mega-platinum, aging rock star's supermodel wife is abducted by pirates while vacationing in Chile.

recommendations.title: Cracks
recommendations.overview: Jealousy flares after the headmistress of an elite boarding school for girls becomes obsessed with a new student.

recommendations.title: The Brass Teapot
recommendations.overview: When a couple discovers that a brass teapot makes them money whenever they hurt themselves, they must come to terms with how far they are willing to go.

recommendations.title: High Lane
recommendations.overview: A group of friends on a climbing vacation ignore warnings that the mountains are closed and start their ascent anyway. Collapsing bridges, bear traps and other dangers threaten to splinter the group… when the real hell begins and an unseen villain be

recommendations.title: Una
recommendations.overview: When a young woman unexpectedly arrives at an older man's workplace, looking for answers, the secrets of the past threaten to unravel his new life.

recommendations.title: Woman in the Dunes
recommendations.overview: A vacationing entomologist suffers extreme physical and psychological trauma after being taken captive by the residents of a poor seaside village and made to live with a woman whose life task is shoveling sand for them.

recommendations.title: Dot the I
recommendations.overview: A fiery Spanish woman is about to marry a kind British man when she meets a Brazilian actor who ignites in her a flame of lust she can't ignore.

recommendations.title: Primal

recommendations.title: Midnight Lace
recommendations.overview: Kit Preston begins to unravel when she receives threatening telephone calls informing her she's soon to be murdered.

recommendations.title: The Legend of La Llorona
recommendations.overview: While vacationing in Mexico, a couple discovers their son's disappearance is tied to a supernatural curse.
